commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=666557734959fa13bdef332e157fb766bbc14d8a)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a Claude CLI JSONL parser fallback that forwards `assistant` records without a non-null `stop_reason` as streaming deltas, plus parser coverage.

PR surface: Source +57, Tests +159. Total +216 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction of the user-visible bug is available here. Source inspection does show the proposed risk path: assistant records without `stop_reason` fall through to delta emission, while the linked live bug still needs a raw stream-json sample.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor live proof and maintainer dependency-contract judgment; automation cannot infer Claude CLI assistant-record semantics from the current branch.

target.title: fix: relay Claude CLI assistant partial messages as streaming deltas
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
